description: Tracks complex debug cases in project-root /coe case files using only Problem, Hypothesis, and Evidence nodes to maintain falsifiable, evidence-backed investigations.

changes: Import the Chain-of-Evidence debug skill into AstartesSkills under the managed skill id coe-debug.

Normalize the skill body, case schema, and bundled template to English-only Problem, Hypothesis, and Evidence terminology.
